x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Sourcing negotiation volume indicates the frequency of supplier negotiations that Now Assist can assist with through document summarization, term analysis, and recommendation generation. Adequate negotiation volume maximizes AI impact on procurement outcomes.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Ensure sourcing negotiations are being conducted through SPO.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_1ff89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c20
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Sourcing negotiation volume indicates the frequency of supplier negotiations that Now Assist can assist with through document summarization, term analysis, and recommendation generation. Adequate negotiation volume maximizes AI impact on procurement outcomes.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Sourcing Negotiation Volume</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_shop_negotiation");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=50)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" negotiations",finding:c+" negotiations found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" negotiations",finding:c+" negotiations found."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"0 negotiations",finding:"No sourcing negotiations found."};
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>SPO</module><number>CHK0000574</number><order/><remediation_guidance>Ensure sourcing negotiations are being conducted through SPO.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>1ff89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c20</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Sourcing Negotiation Volume</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_1ff89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c20</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
